name: minimal_valid
description: Smallest possible valid program: warehouse + robot + one task with one step
code:
warehouse : size(3, 3)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
tasks :
  move : goTo(1, 1)

name: full_featured
description: Uses all sections and all 8 command types
code:
warehouse : size(10, 8)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
objects :
  shelf shelfA at (3, 0)
  package pkg1 at (5, 2)
  charger dock at (0, 7)
obstacles :
  at (4, 4)
  from (6, 6) to (6, 7)
waypoints :
  home at (0, 0)
tasks :
  main :
    goTo(pkg1)
    pickup(pkg1)
    goTo(shelfA)
    load(shelfA)
    turn(down)
    goTo(shelfA)
    unload(shelfA)
    drop()
    goTo(dock)
    scan(dock)
    charge()
    goTo(home)

name: unusual_section_order
description: Sections in non-standard order: tasks first, then objects, then warehouse, then robot
code:
tasks :
  t1 : goTo(1, 1)
objects :
  shelf s1 at (2, 2)
warehouse : size(5, 5)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing up

name: with_comments
description: Program with single-line and multi-line comments throughout
code:
// This is a warehouse program
warehouse : size(5, 5)

/* Robot starts
   at the origin */
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right

// A simple task
tasks :
  patrol : // patrol the grid
    goTo(2, 2)
    turn(left)
    goTo(0, 0)

name: multiple_tasks
description: Three separate tasks that flatten into one command sequence
code:
warehouse : size(6, 6)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
objects :
  package crate at (2, 0)
  shelf storage at (4, 0)
tasks :
  fetch :
    goTo(crate)
    pickup(crate)
  store :
    goTo(storage)
    load(storage)
  returnToStart :
    goTo(0, 0)
    turn(down)

name: missing_warehouse
description: No warehouse section — should produce validation error
code:
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
tasks :
  t : goTo(1, 1)

name: missing_robot
description: No robot section — should produce validation error

name: missing_tasks
description: No tasks section — should produce validation error
code:
warehouse : size(5, 5)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right

name: robot_out_of_bounds
description: Robot start position is outside the warehouse grid
code:
warehouse : size(3, 3)
robot : start at (10, 10) facing right
tasks :
  t : goTo(1, 1)

name: duplicate_name
description: Same name used for an object and a waypoint
code:
warehouse : size(5, 5)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
objects :
  shelf alpha at (1, 0)
waypoints :
  alpha at (2, 2)
tasks :
  t : goTo(1, 1)

name: pickup_targets_shelf
description: pickup command references a shelf instead of a package
code:
warehouse : size(5, 5)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
objects :
  shelf myShelf at (2, 0)
tasks :
  t : pickup(myShelf)

name: pickup_wrong_location
description: Robot tries to pickup a package but is not at the package location
code:
warehouse : size(5, 5)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
objects :
  package box at (3, 3)
tasks :
  t : pickup(box)

name: goto_crosses_obstacle
description: goTo path must cross through an obstacle cell
code:
warehouse : size(5, 5)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
obstacles :
  at (2, 0)
tasks :
  t : goTo(4, 0)

name: drop_nothing
description: Robot tries to drop but is not carrying anything
code:
warehouse : size(3, 3)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
tasks :
  t : drop()

name: charge_no_charger
description: Robot tries to charge but is not on a charger cell
code:
warehouse : size(3, 3)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
tasks :
  t : charge()
